steps: Let total cupcakes = x. Sold in morning = (2/5)x. Sold in afternoon = (1/4)x. Total sold = (2/5)x + (1/4)x = (8/20 + 5/20)x = (13/20)x. Left = x - (13/20)x = (7/20)x. Given left = 21, so (7/20)x = 21 → x = 21 * (20/7) = 3 * 20 = 60. Check: morning sold = 24, afternoon sold = 15, total sold = 39, left = 60 - 39 = 21. Correct.
